---
title: "History of Game Theory & Mathematics"
description: "From Cournot 1838 through von Neumann, Nash, Selten, to modern Nobel laureates."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="history-of-gt-mathematics"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# History of Game Theory & Mathematics

From Cournot 1838 through von Neumann, Nash, Selten, to modern Nobel laureates.
